text: Some weight loss/craving control, lessened desire to drink Tons of tingling in the hands/feet, intense hypersomnia (sleeping 16+ hours a day), increased aggressiveness, loss of appetite, lack of energy Topiramate was given as a mood stabilizer for bipolar and BPD, ended up sleeping a great deal of the time, which I suppose stabilizes your moods if you're never awake to have them.
